purpose: Define a paper-ready baseline/ablation matrix for CadStruct raster floorplan MoE scene-graph parsing and identify missing evidence before SCI2 positioning.

readiness_decision.reason: Contains relation opt-in is validated on expected-json dev/smoke paths, but paper-level baseline matrix, model-output validation, and cross-source/real drawing evidence are still incomplete.

registered_expert_model_locked_smoke.role: registered expert model-output sanity on SVG-derived candidates

symbol_policy_overlay_p085.role: symbol default vs opt-in downstream overlay evidence

contains_policy_p095_dev.role: primary non-locked expected-json validation for contains opt-in

contains_policy_p095_real_v3_smoke.role: secondary expected-json sanity validation for contains opt-in

paper_ablation_matrix.variant: Existing fusion_v2 on expected_json oracle nodes
Registered expert checkpoints on SVG-derived candidates
Symbol P0-76 balanced opt-in downstream overlay
Existing fusion_v2 contains relation behavior on dev/secondary paths
Combined P0-76 symbol opt-in + contains opt-in
paper_ablation_matrix.missing_reason: Needs combined replay on model/detector overlay path; current contains validation uses expected_json nodes and current symbol evidence uses overlay path separately.

paper_ablation_matrix.variant: Single-pass/non-MoE floorplan scene graph parser baseline
paper_ablation_matrix.missing_reason: No paper-ready non-MoE baseline table has been assembled.
No independent external/industrial drawing evaluation yet.

minimum_next_experiments: Create model-output or detector-overlay replay for contains policy to reduce expected-json dependence.
Build a no-MoE or simple-rule baseline table for node/relation F1.
Run combined symbol+contains opt-in where schemas permit fair comparison.
Add cross-dataset or small real drawing evaluation before SCI2 claim.

can_claim_now: Audit-driven symbol policy handoff with default/opt-in separation.
Contains relation opt-in validated on non-locked expected-json dev and secondary smoke paths.
Clear relation error attribution and promotion-gated replay workflow.
cannot_claim_yet: Runtime default superiority on model-output path.
